title: ageratum paniculatum
intro: Ageratum paniculatum, also known as Mexican bluebell or butterfly flower, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ageratum paniculatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ageratum paniculatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
